mnemonics: Please Do Not Throw Sausage Pizza Away (for the data link layer sublayers: LLC - Logical Link Control & MAC - Media Access Control)
keyPoints: Responsible for node-to-node data delivery on the same network
Handles framing, physical addressing, flow control, error control, and access control
Divided into two sublayers: Logical Link Control (LLC) and Media Access Control (MAC)
commonMistakes: Confusing the data link layer's MAC address with the network layer's IP address
Forgetting that flow control is a primary function of the data link layer, not just the transport layer
